channel.title: alixandstephen TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from alixandstephen

item.title: Can’t wait for you all to meet the new baby! #alixandstephen #enclosure

item.title: She is SOO cool! But way too fast lol thank you @Sapphire Dragons !! #alixandstephen #beardeddragon

item.title: Icarus still hasn’t laid her eggs since I put sand in her cage btw. But she’s been acting normal. Her belly isn’t crazy big either. #alixandstephen #chameleon
item.description: Icarus still hasn’t laid her eggs since I put sand in her cage btw. But she’s been acting normal. Her belly isn’t crazy big either. #alixandstephen #chameleon

item.title: Spent a few hundred but it was worth it for his majesty 💚 #alixandstephen #chameleon

item.title: He is literally only a daddy’s boy for the camera, this is crazy 😂😂 #alixandstephen #dad

item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: You gave us more than objects, more than things we’ll hold or see, you gave our family moments, and chances to simply be happy. ❤️ Thank you for being our friends @AT&T! #alixandstephen #happy
item.description: You gave us more than objects, more than things we’ll hold or see, you gave our family moments, and chances to simply be happy. ❤️ Thank you for being our friends @AT&T! #alixandstephen #happy

item.description: This is what the lack of father created… #dad #rugby #alixandstephen
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: Seems like my mommy moments are getting more and more rare nowadays. So THANK YOU @Bella Mckay - “B&B Nails” for the fine job ❤️❤️❤️ #mom #alixandstephen

item.title: They were super kind to us and especially the kids. They gave em stickers and a truck tour. When we were in the truck, there was a guy on lunch break that didn’t have money so they covered his meal. They deserve all the business they can handle ❤️ @Jus Ch
item.description: They were super kind to us and especially the kids. They gave em stickers and a truck tour. When we were in the truck, there was a guy on lunch break that didn’t have money so they covered his meal. They deserve all the business they can handle ❤️ @Jus Ch
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: Shenron wants 90% exploration 10% cage, Porunga is 50-50 and Icarus 80-20. #chameleon #alixandstephen
